articles.title: Leipzig tighten top-four grip as Union's Eta suffers second loss
articles.description: RB Leipzig moved closer to a Champions League return after thumping Union Berlin 3-1 at home on Friday and handing coach Marie-Louise Eta her second straight Bundesliga defeat. Leipzig missed out on Europe this season for the first time since their 2016-17 top-flight debut, but a seventh win in their past eight matches kept them on track for the Champions League next term.

articles.title: CNN reunites collapsed Boston marathoner with competitor who helped him finish
articles.description: Ajay Haridasse was nearing the finish of the Boston Marathon when severe leg cramps left him unable to stand. Two strangers stopped to help, supporting him all the way across the finish line. Ajay Haridasse and Aaron Beggs, one of the runners who assisted him, joined Victor Blackwell. Ajay says he feels "lucky" and "grateful" that two strangers stopped to help him.
